task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Response-Templates' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Response-Templates' is visible in the BlueMail sidebar or folder list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Template: Acknowledgment' draft exists in the 'Response-Templates' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email draft with the subject 'Template: Acknowledgment' is visible inside the 'Response-Templates' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Template: Schedule Call' draft exists in the 'Response-Templates' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email draft with the subject 'Template: Schedule Call' is visible inside the 'Response-Templates' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Template: Fix Deployed' draft exists in the 'Response-Templates' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email draft with the subject 'Template: Fix Deployed' is visible inside the 'Response-Templates' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify a reply was sent to an existing email in the Inbox using the Acknowledgment template content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sent email or compose window showing a reply (Subject starting with 'Re:' or containing 'Reply') with the text 'received it and are reviewing' in the body.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Template: Acknowledgment' draft is still preserved in the 'Response-Templates' folder after the reply is sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template: Acknowledgment' draft remains visible in the 'Response-Templates' folder at the end of the trajectory, alongside the other two templates.

integrity.description: The agent used the BlueMail GUI to create folders, drafts, and send the email.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the BlueMail application interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent replied to an actual email in the Inbox rather than just creating a standalone draft with a 'Re:' subject.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reply compose window or sent email shows a history/quote of a previous email from the Inbox (e.g., from SAdev) and the 'To' field is populated with the original sender's address.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the folder or email creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: All email and folder creation activities occur exclusively within the BlueMail application window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required folder name is exactly 'Response-Templates'. The three templates must have the exact subjects: 'Template: Acknowledgment', 'Template: Schedule Call', and 'Template: Fix Deployed'. The sent reply must contain the body fragment 'received it and are reviewing' and its subject must start with 'Re:' or contain 'Reply'. The verifier only checks the subjects of the saved templates in the folder, but strictly checks the body content of the sent reply.
